nodes.label: Default Album Art (Vinyl Record Placeholder)
nodes.description: Square PNG placeholder artwork depicting a stylized vinyl record / CD disc on a near-black background. A slightly lighter dark-gray circular disc occupies the center, with a concentric inner ring and a small center spindle dot. Minimalist, monochromatic, flat/silhouette style with no text or logos.
nodes.style: minimalist, flat, monochromatic dark, low-contrast, centered composition
nodes.shape: circular disc centered on square canvas
nodes.purpose: fallback artwork displayed when no album/track art is available
